13.question: 统计各品类的退款率（退款订单数/总订单数），找出退款率超过15%的品类

runs.sql:
WITH category_orders AS (
  SELECT dim_product.category_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_order_detail.order_id) AS total_orders
  FROM dwd_order_detail
  INNER JOIN dwd_order_item_detail ON dwd_order_detail.order_id = dwd_order_item_detail.order_id
  INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
  GROUP BY dim_product.category_id
),
category_refunds AS (
  SELECT dim_product.category_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_refund_detail.order_id) AS refund_orders
  FROM dwd_refund_detail
  INNER JOIN dwd_order_item_detail ON dwd_refund_detail.order_id = dwd_order_item_detail.order_id
  INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
  WHERE dwd_refund_detail.refund_status = '已退款'
  GROUP BY dim_product.category_id
)
SELECT category_id, category_name, category_orders.total_orders, COALESCE(category_refunds.refund_orders, 0) AS refund_orders, CAST(COALESCE(category_refunds.refund_orders, 0) AS REAL) / category_orders.total_orders AS refund_rate
FROM category_orders
LEFT JOIN category_refunds ON category_orders.category_id = category_refunds.category_id
INNER JOIN dim_category ON category_orders.category_id = dim_category.category_id
GROUP BY category_id, category_name, category_orders.total_orders
HAVING refund_rate > 0.15
ORDER BY refund_rate DESC

WITH category_order_cnt AS (
  SELECT dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_order_detail.order_id) AS total_order_cnt
  FROM dwd_order_detail
  INNER JOIN dwd_order_item_detail ON dwd_order_detail.order_id = dwd_order_item_detail.order_id
  INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
  INNER JOIN dim_category ON dim_product.category_id = dim_category.category_id
  GROUP BY dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name
),
category_refund_cnt AS (
  SELECT dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_refund_detail.order_id) AS refund_order_cnt
  FROM dwd_refund_detail
  INNER JOIN dwd_order_item_detail ON dwd_refund_detail.order_id = dwd_order_item_detail.order_id
  INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
  INNER JOIN dim_category ON dim_product.category_id = dim_category.category_id
  WHERE dwd_refund_detail.refund_status IN ('审核通过', '退款中', '已退款')
  GROUP BY dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name
)
SELECT category_order_cnt.category_name, category_order_cnt.total_order_cnt, category_refund_cnt.refund_order_cnt, CAST(category_refund_cnt.refund_order_cnt AS REAL) / category_order_cnt.total_order_cnt AS refund_rate
FROM category_order_cnt
INNER JOIN category_refund_cnt ON category_order_cnt.category_id = category_refund_cnt.category_id
WHERE refund_rate > 0.15
ORDER BY refund_rate DESC

22.question: 计算每个商品的销售额及其在所属品类总销售额中的占比

select.expr: CAST(product_sales AS FLOAT) / CAST(category_sales AS FLOAT)

runs.sql:
SELECT dwd_order_item_detail.product_id, dim_product.product_name, dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) AS product_sales, SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name) AS category_sales, CAST(SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) AS FLOAT) / CAST(SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name) AS FLOAT) AS sales_ratio
FROM dwd_order_item_detail
INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
INNER JOIN dim_category ON dim_product.category_id = dim_category.category_id
GROUP BY dwd_order_item_detail.product_id, dim_product.product_name, dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name

WITH category_sales AS (
  SELECT dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) AS category_total_sales
  FROM dwd_order_item_detail
  INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
  INNER JOIN dim_category ON dim_product.category_id = dim_category.category_id
  GROUP BY dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name
)
SELECT dwd_order_item_detail.product_id, dim_product.product_name, dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) AS product_sales, category_sales.category_total_sales, CAST(SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) AS REAL) / category_sales.category_total_sales AS sales_ratio
FROM dwd_order_item_detail
INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
INNER JOIN dim_category ON dim_product.category_id = dim_category.category_id
INNER JOIN category_sales ON dim_product.category_id = category_sales.category_id
GROUP BY dwd_order_item_detail.product_id, dim_product.product_name, dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, category_sales.category_total_sales
ORDER BY dim_category.category_name ASC, product_sales DESC

WITH product_sales AS (
  SELECT dim_product.product_id, dim_product.product_name, dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) AS product_sales
  FROM dwd_order_item_detail
  INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
  INNER JOIN dim_category ON dim_product.category_id = dim_category.category_id
  GROUP BY dim_product.product_id, dim_product.product_name, dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name
)
SELECT product_sales.product_id, product_sales.product_name, product_sales.category_name, product_sales.product_sales, SUM(product_sales) AS category_total_sales, ROUND(product_sales.product_sales * 1.0 / SUM(product_sales), 4) AS sales_ratio
FROM product_sales
ORDER BY product_sales.category_name ASC, product_sales.product_sales DESC

25.question: 每个渠道按月统计订单数，以及该渠道当月订单数在所有渠道当月总订单数中的占比

select.expr: CAST(order_count AS FLOAT) / CAST(month_total AS FLOAT)

runs.sql:
WITH channel_monthly_orders AS (
  SELECT dim_channel.channel_id, dim_channel.channel_name, strftime('%Y-%m', dwd_order_detail.order_dt) AS month, COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM dwd_order_detail
  INNER JOIN dim_channel ON dwd_order_detail.channel_id = dim_channel.channel_id
  GROUP BY dim_channel.channel_id, dim_channel.channel_name, strftime('%Y-%m', dwd_order_detail.order_dt)
)
SELECT channel_name, month, order_count, CAST(order_count AS FLOAT) / CAST(SUM(order_count) OVER (PARTITION BY month) AS FLOAT) AS ratio
FROM channel_monthly_orders
ORDER BY month ASC, order_count DESC

SELECT dwd_order_detail.channel_id, dim_channel.channel_name, strftime('%Y-%m', dwd_order_detail.order_dt) AS month, COUNT(dwd_order_detail.order_id) AS order_count, ROUND(1.0 * COUNT(dwd_order_detail.order_id) / SUM(COUNT(dwd_order_detail.order_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY month) * 100, 2) AS 占比
FROM dwd_order_detail
INNER JOIN dim_channel ON dwd_order_detail.channel_id = dim_channel.channel_id
GROUP BY dwd_order_detail.channel_id, dim_channel.channel_name, strftime('%Y-%m', dwd_order_detail.order_dt)
ORDER BY month ASC, 占比 DESC

WITH channel_monthly AS (
  SELECT dim_channel.channel_id, dim_channel.channel_name, strftime('%Y-%m', dwd_order_detail.order_dt) AS month, COUNT(dwd_order_detail.order_id) AS order_count
  FROM dwd_order_detail
  INNER JOIN dim_channel ON dwd_order_detail.channel_id = dim_channel.channel_id
  GROUP BY dim_channel.channel_id, dim_channel.channel_name, strftime('%Y-%m', dwd_order_detail.order_dt)
)
SELECT channel_monthly.channel_name, channel_monthly.month, channel_monthly.order_count, ROUND(CAST(channel_monthly.order_count AS REAL) / SUM(channel_monthly.order_count) OVER (PARTITION BY channel_monthly.month) * 100, 2) AS 占比
FROM channel_monthly
ORDER BY channel_monthly.month ASC, channel_monthly.order_count DESC

38.question: 各品类内，按销售额排名前3的商品及其销售额在品类中的占比

runs.sql:
WITH category_product_sales AS (
  SELECT dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, dim_product.product_id, dim_product.product_name, SUM(dwd_order_item_detail.actual_amount) AS product_sales
  FROM dwd_order_item_detail
  INNER JOIN dwd_order_detail ON dwd_order_item_detail.order_id = dwd_order_detail.order_id
  INNER JOIN dim_product ON dwd_order_item_detail.product_id = dim_product.product_id
  INNER JOIN dim_category ON dim_product.category_id = dim_category.category_id
  WHERE dwd_order_detail.order_status = '已完成'
  GROUP BY dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name, dim_product.product_id, dim_product.product_name
),
category_total_sales AS (
  SELECT category_id, category_name, SUM(product_sales) AS category_total_sales
  FROM category_product_sales
  GROUP BY category_id, category_name
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT category_product_sales.category_name, category_product_sales.product_name, category_product_sales.product_sales, ROUND(CAST(category_product_sales.product_sales AS REAL) / category_total_sales.category_total_sales, 4) AS sales_ratio, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category_product_sales.category_id ORDER BY category_product_sales.product_sales DESC) AS rn
  FROM category_product_sales
  INNER JOIN category_total_sales ON category_product_sales.category_id = category_total_sales.category_id
  ORDER BY category_product_sales.category_name ASC, rn ASC
) AS _q
WHERE rn <= 3

WITH product_category_sales AS (

  INNER JOIN dim_category ON dim_product.category_id = dim_category.category_id
  GROUP BY dim_product.product_id, dim_product.product_name, dim_category.category_id, dim_category.category_name
),
category_total_sales AS (

  GROUP BY category_id, category_name
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT product_category_sales.category_name, product_category_sales.product_name, product_category_sales.product_sales, category_total_sales.category_total_sales, ROUND(product_category_sales.product_sales * 1.0 / category_total_sales.category_total_sales, 4) AS sales_ratio, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY product_category_sales.category_id ORDER BY product_category_sales.product_sales DESC) AS rn
  FROM product_category_sales
  INNER JOIN category_total_sales ON product_category_sales.category_id = category_total_sales.category_id

  WHERE dwd_order_detail.order_status = '已完成'
  GROUP BY dim_user.age_group
),
refund_stats AS (
  SELECT dim_user.age_group, COUNT(DISTINCT dwd_refund_detail.order_id) AS refund_orders
  FROM dwd_refund_detail
  INNER JOIN dwd_order_detail ON dwd_refund_detail.order_id = dwd_order_detail.order_id
  INNER JOIN dim_user ON dwd_order_detail.user_id = dim_user.user_id
  WHERE dwd_order_detail.order_status = '已完成'
  GROUP BY dim_user.age_group
)
SELECT order_stats.age_group, order_stats.completed_orders, COALESCE(refund_stats.refund_orders, 0) AS refund_orders, ROUND(CAST(COALESCE(refund_stats.refund_orders, 0) AS REAL) / order_stats.completed_orders, 4) AS refund_rate
FROM order_stats
LEFT JOIN refund_stats ON order_stats.age_group = refund_stats.age_group
ORDER BY refund_rate DESC

WITH completed_orders AS (

refund_orders AS (
